mapper.select: SELECT A.DISABL_ID, A.DISABL_TYPE, A.DISABL_CD, A.DISABL_ERR_CD, TO_CHAR(A.DISABL_START_TM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DISABL_START_TM, TO_CHAR(A.DISABL_END_TM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DISABL_END_TM, A.DISABL_DESC FROM MA3_EMGNCY_DISABL A LEFT JOIN MA30_APPROVAL_MGT B ON A.DISABL_ID = B.APPR_CD WHERE A.STS_CD = '00' AND A.USE_FLG = 'Y' AND CURRENT TIMESTAMP BETWEEN A.DISABL_START_TM AND A.DISABL_END_TM AND B.APPR_STATUS = 'PF4005' ORDER BY A.UPD_TMP DESC WITH UR
